turns.query: Analyze 24-hour pollution evolution patterns in Shenze County on 2025-06-24, identifying temporal hotspots and their spatial distribution.
turns.actual_response:
查询结果显示数据库中没有名为 "Shenze County" 的区县。为了确保准确性，我们需要确认 Shenze County 是否存在于数据库中，或者是否存在名称上的差异。

请提供 Shenze County 的正确名称或确认该区县是否确实存在于数据库中。如果确认该区县名称正确，我们将再次尝试查询其AQI数据。
validation_errors: Custom validator failed: mean_aqi not set
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查询 Shenze County 在2025年6月24日的每小时AQI数据
query = text("""
SELECT 
    hdaq.timestamp, 
    hdaq.aqi, 
    d.name AS district_name
FROM 
    hourly_district_air_quality hdaq
JOIN 
    district d ON hdaq.district_id = d.id
WHERE 
    d.name = 'Shenze County' AND 
    hdaq.timestamp >= '2025-06-24 00:00:00' AND 
    hdaq.timestamp < '2025-06-25 00:00:00'
ORDER BY 
    hdaq.timestamp
""")

df = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
print(df.head())

# 查询 Shenze County 的区县ID
query_district_id = text("""
SELECT id, name FROM district WHERE name = 'Shenze County'
""")

district_df = pd.read_sql(query_district_id, engine)
print(district_df)

# 如果找到区县ID，再次查询每小时AQI数据
if not district_df.empty:
    district_id = district_df.iloc[0]['id']
    query_aqi = text("""
    SELECT 
        hdaq.timestamp, 
        hdaq.aqi, 
        d.name AS district_name
    FROM 
        hourly_district_air_quality hdaq
    JOIN 
        district d ON hdaq.district_id = d.id
    WHERE 
        hdaq.district_id = :district_id AND 
        hdaq.timestamp >= '2025-06-24 00:00:00' AND 
        hdaq.timestamp < '2025-06-25 00:00:00'
    ORDER BY 
        hdaq.timestamp
    """)
    df = pd.read_sql(query_aqi, engine, params={"district_id": district_id})
    print(df.head())

# 查询所有区县的名称
query_all_districts = text("""
SELECT id, name FROM district
""")

all_districts_df = pd.read_sql(query_all_districts, engine)
print(all_districts_df)
